problem id: 5bb8c8a5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00110110 -> 10000000
  10100011 -> 01000000
  01111011 -> 01000000
  11101110 -> 10000001
  00111110 -> 10000000
  10001000 -> 00000001
  11100110 -> 10000000
  01111110 -> 10000000
  01001000 -> 00000000

query: 00110001
predicted answer: 00000000
